title: Integrations
card.sentryDesc: Send panics, error events, and span breadcrumbs to your Sentry project. Disabled when no DSN is configured.
card.webhooksDesc: Outbound delivery of EventBus events to external HTTP endpoints. Edit the YAML here and save it to the local DCC-MCP config directory.
card.wecomDesc: Push selected DCC-MCP events to an Enterprise WeChat group robot with a customizable markdown template.
card.otlpDesc: Export distributed traces and metrics via gRPC to Jaeger, Grafana Tempo, or any OTLP-compatible collector.
placeholder.secretOverride: Paste a new value to override after restart
placeholder.webhooksYaml:
queue_capacity: 1024
webhooks:
  - name: studio-events
    url: http://127.0.0.1:9000/dcc-mcp-events
    events:
      - tool.failed
      - gateway.instance.*
toast.saved: {kind} config saved locally — restart required to apply.
error.invalidDsn: Invalid DSN format. Enter a valid Sentry DSN URL.
error.invalidWebhookUrl: Enter a valid WeCom robot webhook URL.
help.envOverride: Current runtime value comes from {envVar}. Manual changes are staged for restart.
help.webhooksYaml: Saved to ~/dcc-mcp/etc/webhooks.yaml by default. Set DCC_MCP_ETC_DIR to choose another local config directory.
help.wecomWebhookUrl: Enterprise WeChat group robot webhook. The key is treated as a secret and masked after save.
help.eventTypes: Comma or newline separated EventBus patterns. Wildcards like tool.* are supported.
help.messageTemplate: Supported variables: $event, $event-id, $dcc-type, $instance-id, $tool-slug, $skill-name, $url. Existing {{source.dcc_type}} paths also work at delivery time.
help.endpoint: OTLP gRPC collector endpoint, e.g. http://localhost:4317
